title: Revisiting Differentially Private Federated Learning for Tabular Data: A Matched-Accounting Benchmark of Boosting versus DP-SGD
description: Source code, experimental configurations, privacy-accounting parameters, and result logs for the matched-accounting benchmark comparing differentially private gradient boosting against DP-SGD for federated learning on tabular data. Both method families are calibrated with the same privacy accountant to identical (epsilon, delta) budgets.

creators.name: Alzahrani, Ahmed
creators.affiliation: Faculty of Computing and Information Technology (FCIT), King Abdulaziz University, Jeddah, Saudi Arabia
